message:
fix(patrol): remove --root-only flag dropped from bd mol wisp create

The --root-only flag was removed from bd mol wisp create, causing patrol
spawn to fail. Remove the flag and materialize all step children instead.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2138
Co-Authored-By: Krystian Gebis <krystian.gebis@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
